svg.title: LLM proxy agency platform — full technical architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing four layers: edge (Cloudflare Workers), rendering (Puppeteer cluster), data (Kafka, ClickHouse, Redis, PostgreSQL), and dashboard (React, WebSocket, citation tracker).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Cloudflare Workers edge layer')
g.text: Cloudflare Workers · global · TypeScript · <50ms p50 cached

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does bot detection work at the edge?')
sendPrompt('What content transformations happen at the edge?')
sendPrompt('How does KV registry management work for IP ranges?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the rendering layer infrastructure')
sendPrompt('How does the Puppeteer cluster handle parallel rendering?')
sendPrompt('How does BullMQ manage the render job queue?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the full data layer stack')
sendPrompt('How does Kafka handle event ingestion at 50K concurrent events?')
sendPrompt('How is ClickHouse used for analytics storage?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used as cache and job store?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store for platform config?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the React dashboard layer')
sendPrompt('What does the real-time monitoring view show?')
sendPrompt('What analytics does the citation analytics view show?')
sendPrompt('How does the automated citation testing loop work?')
sendPrompt('Which LLMs are queried in the citation testing loop?')
sendPrompt('What does the intelligence layer analyse?')
